API docs by Redocly

Starburst Manager (v2)

Download OpenAPI specification:

About

APIs to manage your system

⬇️ Download OpenAPI specification

Roles

All APIs support the standard Trino role header of X-Trino-Role. Set a role for the API request by setting the header to system=ROLE{role-name}.

Uploads

The combined size of an uploaded set of text files, binary files, or secrets cannot exceed 10MB and each individual file or secret cannot exceed 1MB.

Versions

API Version 2

API Version 1

Manager Service

System management

resumeInstance

Resume a cron batch job instance

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
instanceId
required
string
  • An instance in the system
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/instance/{instanceId}:resume

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "fields": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

path Parameters

  • An instance in the system
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)

connectInstance

Start a new Spark Connect driver

Authorizations:
accessToken
query Parameters
doNotSaveConfiguration
boolean

Use this to disable saving the configuration for this instance. Normally, the configuration used to start instances is saved so that it can be examined and/or duplicated later. If for some reason you do not want this (due to sensitive information, for example), then add this query parameter.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
object (Common)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/instance:connect

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "common": {
    • "applicationName": "string",
    • "sparkProperties": {
      • "property1": "string",
      • "property2": "string"
      },
    • "jars": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "pythonFiles": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "files": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "archives": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "environmentVariables": {
      • "property1": "string",
      • "property2": "string"
      },
    • "resourcePool": "string",
    • "instanceImageId": "string",
    • "secretUploadIds": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "secretUploads": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "fileUploads": [
      • {
        • "uploadId": "string",
        • "mountPath": "string"
        }
      ],
    • "inlineFileUploads": [
      • {
        • "comment": "string",
        • "fileName": "string",
        • "uploadType": "Text",
        • "data": "string",
        • "mountPath": "string"
        }
      ],
    • "options": [
      • "EncryptCommunication"
      ],
    • "volumeMounts": [
      • {
        • "storageId": "string",
        • "storageName": "string",
        • "mountPath": "string",
        • "bindToInstance": true
        }
      ]
    }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 409
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "instanceId": "string"
}

createPresignedUrl

Create pre-signed URLs for the given bucket, key and credentials

Authorizations:
accessToken
Request Body schema: application/json
required
accessKey
required
string

The proxy AccessKey provided by your administrator

secretKey
required
string

The proxy SecretKey provided by your administrator

region
required
string

The S3 region of the bucket

bucket
required
string

The bucket for creating the pre-signed URLs

key
required
string

The key for creating the pre-signed URLs

Responses

/manager/api/v2/presignedUrl

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "accessKey": "string",
  • "secretKey": "string",
  • "region": "string",
  • "bucket": "string",
  • "key": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "presignedUrls": {
    • "property1": "string",
    • "property2": "string"
    }
}

batchInstance

Submit and run a batch job

Authorizations:
accessToken
query Parameters
doNotSaveConfiguration
boolean

Use this to disable saving the configuration for this instance. Normally, the configuration used to start instances is saved so that it can be examined and/or duplicated later. If for some reason you do not want this (due to sensitive information, for example), then add this query parameter.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
applicationResource
required
string

The application resource to run - must be on an accessible object store

mainClass
string

The main class of the batch job

cronTimeZone
string

Optional CRON timezone. If provided, specify a time zone for the CRON job. Default is UTC.

See List of Time Zones.

cronSchedule
string

Optional CRON schedule. If provided, runs the job on the given schedule.

See Wikipedia's CRON article for details on CRON schedules.

ttlSecondsAfterFinished
integer <int32>

Optional.

ttlSecondsAfterFinished specifies the number of seconds after completion that the driver is eligible to be deleted/cleaned. Default is 1 seconds.

applicationArguments
Array of strings

Any application arguments

required
object (Common)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/instance:batch

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "applicationResource": "string",
  • "mainClass": "string",
  • "cronTimeZone": "string",
  • "cronSchedule": "string",
  • "ttlSecondsAfterFinished": 0,
  • "applicationArguments": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "common": {
    • "applicationName": "string",
    • "sparkProperties": {
      • "property1": "string",
      • "property2": "string"
      },
    • "jars": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "pythonFiles": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "files": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "archives": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "environmentVariables": {
      • "property1": "string",
      • "property2": "string"
      },
    • "resourcePool": "string",
    • "instanceImageId": "string",
    • "secretUploadIds": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "secretUploads": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "fileUploads": [
      • {
        • "uploadId": "string",
        • "mountPath": "string"
        }
      ],
    • "inlineFileUploads": [
      • {
        • "comment": "string",
        • "fileName": "string",
        • "uploadType": "Text",
        • "data": "string",
        • "mountPath": "string"
        }
      ],
    • "options": [
      • "EncryptCommunication"
      ],
    • "volumeMounts": [
      • {
        • "storageId": "string",
        • "storageName": "string",
        • "mountPath": "string",
        • "bindToInstance": true
        }
      ]
    }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 409
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "instanceId": "string"
}

restartInstance

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
instanceId
required
string
  • An instance in the system
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/instance/{instanceId}:restart

  • 401
  • 403

[

]

path Parameters

notebook

Shutdown and remove all notebook servers

accessToken
query Parameters
preserveUserData
boolean

Preserve user data when deleting the notebook servers

/manager/api/v2/:notebook

deleteInstance

Shutdown and remove an instance

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
instanceId
required
string
  • An instance in the system
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)
query Parameters
preserveUserData
boolean

Preserve user data when deleting the notebook server

force
boolean

Use with caution! Immediately deletes instance without waiting for normal shutdown. This will likely result in loss of final logs, events, etc.

Responses

/manager/api/v2/instance/{instanceId}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "fields": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
instanceId
required
string
  • An instance in the system
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/instance/{instanceId}/logs:all

Response samples

  • 404

application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "fields": [
    • "string"

userInstance

List instances available to the current user

Authorizations:
accessToken
query Parameters
showAll
boolean

If true, show terminated instances as well as active instances

Responses

/manager/api/v2/instance:user

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "instanceId": "string",
    • "name": "string",
    • "type": "string",
    • "createdBy": "string",
    • "ownerRole": "string",
    • "details": {
      • "property1": "string",
      • "property2": "string"
      }
    }
]

duplicateInstance

Create/start a duplicate instance of the any instance

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
instanceId
required
string
  • An instance in the system
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)
query Parameters
doNotSaveConfiguration
boolean

Use this to disable saving the configuration for this instance. Normally, the configuration used to start instances is saved so that it can be examined and/or duplicated later. If for some reason you do not want this (due to sensitive information, for example), then add this query parameter.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
newName
string

The application name. If not provided a name will be generated.

resourcePool
string

Optional - the resource pool to use (you must have permission to use it)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/instance/{instanceId}:duplicate

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "newName": "string",
  • "resourcePool": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "instanceId": "string"
}

path Parameters

path Parameters
instanceId

  • An instance in the system

query Parameters
showAll
boolean

notebookInstance

Start a new notebook server

Authorizations:
accessToken
query Parameters
doNotSaveConfiguration
boolean

Use this to disable saving the configuration for this instance. Normally, the configuration used to start instances is saved so that it can be examined and/or duplicated later. If for some reason you do not want this (due to sensitive information, for example), then add this query parameter.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
notebookName
string

The notebook name. If not provided a name will be generated.

resourcePool
string

Optional - the resource pool to use (you must have permission to use it)

instanceImageId
string

Instance image id to use (you must have permission to use it)

description
string

Optional - the description of the notebook instance

Array of objects (VolumeMount)

Volumes to mount to the server (read only)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/instance:notebook

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "notebookName": "string",
  • "resourcePool": "string",
  • "instanceImageId": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "volumeMounts": [
    • {
      • "storageId": "string",
      • "storageName": "string",
      • "mountPath": "string",
      • "bindToInstance": true
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 409
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "instanceId": "string"
}

getLogsWithIndex

Get the log output of an instance. logsId is the log index to return: Some cluster types have multiple nodes/workers. Pass 0 to get the main logs and then increase the index to get other logs.

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
instanceId
required
string
  • An instance in the system
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)
logsId
required
string

Logs from an instance

Responses

/manager/api/v2/instance/{instanceId}/logs/{logsId}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "fields": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

Resources Service

Resource pool management

getResourcePool

Return the current resource pool set including the total available memory and cores

Authorizations:
accessToken

Responses

/manager/api/v2/resourcePool

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "totalMemory": "string",
  • "totalCores": "string",
  • "totalGpus": "string",
  • "resourcePools": {
    • "resourcePools": [
      • {
        • "resourcePoolId": "string",
        • "priority": 0,
        • "minMemory": "string",
        • "minCores": "string",
        • "maxMemory": "string",
        • "maxCores": "string",
        • "maxGpus": "string",
        • "applicationMaxGpus": "string"
        }
      ]
    }
}

updateResourcePool

Update the set of available resource pools (replace the entire set)

Authorizations:
accessToken
Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
Array of objects (ResourcePool)

The set of resource pools

Responses

/manager/api/v2/resourcePool

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "resourcePools": [
    • {
      • "resourcePoolId": "string",
      • "priority": 0,
      • "minMemory": "string",
      • "minCores": "string",
      • "maxMemory": "string",
      • "maxCores": "string",
      • "maxGpus": "string",
      • "applicationMaxGpus": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "fields": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

createResourcePool

Create new resource pool

Authorizations:
accessToken
Request Body schema: application/json
required
resourcePoolId
required
string

The name of this resource pool (must be unique)

priority
integer <int32>

The priority of this pool. Pools with larger/higher priority numbers have priority over pools with smaller/lower priority numbers. If not specified, the priority is "0".

minMemory
required
string

Minimum memory (as a Spark quantity string)

minCores
required
string

Minimum virtual cores (as a CPU unit)

maxMemory
required
string

Maximum memory (as a Spark quantity string)

maxCores
required
string

Maximum virtual cores (as a CPU unit)

maxGpus
string

Maximum gpus (as a Spark quantity string)

applicationMaxGpus
string

Maximum gpus per application (as a Spark quantity string)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/resourcePool

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "resourcePoolId": "string",
  • "priority": 0,
  • "minMemory": "string",
  • "minCores": "string",
  • "maxMemory": "string",
  • "maxCores": "string",
  • "maxGpus": "string",
  • "applicationMaxGpus": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "fields": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

resources.updateResourcePool

Edit resource pool (update all parameters for a single resource pool)

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
resourcePoolId
required
string

A resource pool that describes a minimum and maximum resource set of memory and cores

Request Body schema: application/json
required
resourcePoolId
required
string

The name of this resource pool (must be unique)

priority
integer <int32>

The priority of this pool. Pools with larger/higher priority numbers have priority over pools with smaller/lower priority numbers. If not specified, the priority is "0".

minMemory
required
string

Minimum memory (as a Spark quantity string)

minCores
required
string

Minimum virtual cores (as a CPU unit)

maxMemory
required
string

Maximum memory (as a Spark quantity string)

maxCores
required
string

Maximum virtual cores (as a CPU unit)

maxGpus
string

Maximum gpus (as a Spark quantity string)

applicationMaxGpus
string

Maximum gpus per application (as a Spark quantity string)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/resourcePool/{resourcePoolId}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "resourcePoolId": "string",
  • "priority": 0,
  • "minMemory": "string",
  • "minCores": "string",
  • "maxMemory": "string",
  • "maxCores": "string",
  • "maxGpus": "string",
  • "applicationMaxGpus": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "fields": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

patchUpdateResourcePool

Update single resource pool parameters

Only include fields you wish to update. Missing or unrecognized fields are ignored.

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
resourcePoolId
required
string

A resource pool that describes a minimum and maximum resource set of memory and cores

Request Body schema: application/json
required
resourcePoolId
string

The name of this resource pool (must be unique)

priority
integer <int32>

The priority of this pool. Pools with larger/higher priority numbers have priority over pools with smaller/lower priority numbers. If not specified, the priority is "0".

minMemory
string

Minimum memory (as a Spark quantity string)

minCores
string

Minimum virtual cores (as a CPU unit)

maxMemory
string

Maximum memory (as a Spark quantity string)

maxCores
string

Maximum virtual cores (as a CPU unit)

maxGpus
string

Maximum gpus (as a Spark quantity string)

applicationMaxGpus
string

Maximum gpus per application (as a Spark quantity string)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/resourcePool/{resourcePoolId}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "resourcePoolId": "string",
  • "priority": 0,
  • "minMemory": "string",
  • "minCores": "string",
  • "maxMemory": "string",
  • "maxCores": "string",
  • "maxGpus": "string",
  • "applicationMaxGpus": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "resourcePoolId": "string",
  • "priority": 0,
  • "minMemory": "string",
  • "minCores": "string",
  • "maxMemory": "string",
  • "maxCores": "string",
  • "maxGpus": "string",

Admin Service

Administration

listSystemMaintenanceHistory

Show system maintenance history

Authorizations:
accessToken

Responses

/manager/api/v2/systemMaintenanceHistory

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "activatedAt": "string",
    • "activatedBy": "string",
    • "activatedVersion": "string",
    • "deactivatedAt": "string",
    • "deactivatedBy": "string",
    • "deactivatedVersion": "string"
    }
]

getLogRetentionSettings

Get log retention settings

Authorizations:
accessToken

Responses

/manager/api/v2/logRetentionSettings

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "sparkEventLogsCleanerEnabled": true,
  • "sparkEventLogsCleanerInterval": "string",
  • "sparkEventLogsCleanerMaxAge": "string",
  • "sparkEventLogsCompactionEnabled": true,
  • "sparkEventLogsCompactionMaxFilesToRetain": 0,
  • "instanceLogsCleanerEnabled": true,
  • "instanceLogsCleanerInterval": "string",
  • "instanceLogsCleanerMaxAge": "string"
}

updateLogRetentionSettings

Update log retention settings

Authorizations:
accessToken
Request Body schema: application/json
required
sparkEventLogsCleanerEnabled
boolean

Enable Spark event logs cleaner

sparkEventLogsCleanerInterval
string

Interval for Spark event logs cleaner

sparkEventLogsCleanerMaxAge
string

Max age for Spark event logs to retain

sparkEventLogsCompactionEnabled
boolean

Enable Spark event logs compaction

sparkEventLogsCompactionMaxFilesToRetain
string

Max files to retain after Spark event logs compaction

instanceLogsCleanerEnabled
boolean

Enable instance logs cleaner

instanceLogsCleanerInterval
string

Interval for instance logs cleaner

instanceLogsCleanerMaxAge
string

Max age for instance logs to retain

Responses

/manager/api/v2/logRetentionSettings

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "sparkEventLogsCleanerEnabled": true,
  • "sparkEventLogsCleanerInterval": "string",
  • "sparkEventLogsCleanerMaxAge": "string",
  • "sparkEventLogsCompactionEnabled": true,
  • "sparkEventLogsCompactionMaxFilesToRetain": "string",
  • "instanceLogsCleanerEnabled": true,
  • "instanceLogsCleanerInterval": "string",
  • "instanceLogsCleanerMaxAge": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "sparkEventLogsCleanerEnabled": true,
  • "sparkEventLogsCleanerInterval": "string",
  • "sparkEventLogsCleanerMaxAge": "string",
  • "sparkEventLogsCompactionEnabled": true,
  • "sparkEventLogsCompactionMaxFilesToRetain": 0,
  • "instanceLogsCleanerEnabled": true,
  • "instanceLogsCleanerInterval": "string",
  • "instanceLogsCleanerMaxAge": "string"
}

deleteLogRetentionSettings

Reset log retention settings to defaults

Authorizations:
accessToken

Responses

/manager/api/v2/logRetentionSettings

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "sparkEventLogsCleanerEnabled": true,

getGlobalStorageUsage

Get global storage usage

Authorizations:
accessToken
query Parameters
moreInstances
boolean

Gets top 1000 instances usage

allResourcePools
boolean

Gets all resource pools usage

Responses

/manager/api/v2/globalStorageUsage

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "totalUsedBytes": 0,
  • "totalObjectsCount": 0,
  • "logsUsedBytes": 0,
  • "logObjectsCount": 0,
  • "historyServerEventsUsedBytes": 0,
  • "historyServerEventsObjectsCount": 0,
  • "notebookWorkspacesUsedBytes": 0,
  • "notebookWorkspacesObjectsCount": 0,
  • "instanceUsages": [
    • {
      • "instanceId": "string",
      • "usedBytes": 0,
      • "objectsCount": 0
      }
    ],
  • "resourcePoolUsages": [
    • {
      • "resourcePoolId": "string",
      • "usedBytes": 0,
      • "objectsCount": 0
      }
    ],
  • "lastRefreshedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Uploads Service

File and secret upload management

listSecretUploads

List file uploads

Authorizations:
accessToken

Responses

/manager/api/v2/upload:secret

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "uploadId": "string",
    • "comment": "string",
    • "secretNames": [
      • "string"
      ]
    }
]

createSecretUpload

Create a new secret upload

Authorizations:
accessToken
Request Body schema: application/json
required
comment
required
string

Comment or description. Used only for your own reference purposes.

required
object

Map of name-to-binary secrets. Data must be Base64 encoded.

When the uploaded secret is used in an instance this map of secrets/values are set as environment variables. Thus, the secret name must be valid environment variable identifier.

See Uploads for more details and limits.

Responses

/manager/api/v2/upload:secret

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "comment": "string",
  • "secrets": {
    • "property1": "string",
    • "property2": "string"
    }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "uploadId": "string",
  • "comment": "string",
  • "secretNames": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

getFileUpload Deprecated

Get a file upload - DEPRECATED - This API is deprecated and will be removed in future versions. - New Implementation: manager/api/v2/storage/{storageId}

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
uploadId
required
string

A text or binary file. See Uploads for more details and limits.

Responses

/manager/api/v2/upload/{uploadId}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json

  • "comment": "string",

    • "property1": "string",
    • "property2": "string"
    },
  • "binaryData": {
    • "property1": "string",
    • "property2": "string"
    }
}

InstanceImageImports Service

Instance image imports management

listInstanceImageImport

Get all instance image imports

Authorizations:
accessToken
query Parameters
pageToken
string

Pagination token

pageSize
integer <int32>

Page size or 0 for default (current maximum is 100)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/instanceImageImport

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "nextPageToken": "string",
  • "result": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "repository": "string",
      • "tag": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "allowInsecure": true,
      • "isPrivate": true,
      • "status": "New",
      • "statusDescription": "string",
      • "createdBy": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

createInstanceImageImport

Submit and run a instance image import

Authorizations:
accessToken
Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string

Image name

repository
required
string

Registry with repository name to import

tag
required
string

Image tag to import

description
string

Optional image description

allowInsecure
required
boolean

Allow insecure registry connection

isPrivate
required
boolean

Registry require credentials for accessing

object (Credentials)

Credentials required for accessing registry

Responses

/manager/api/v2/instanceImageImport

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "repository": "string",
  • "tag": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "allowInsecure": true,
  • "isPrivate": true,
  • "credentials": {
    • "username": "string",
    • "password": "string"
    }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "instanceImageImportId": "string"
}

required
string

updateInstanceImageInstanceImageStatus

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
instanceImageId
required
string

An instance image

Request Body schema: application/json
required
status
required
string
Enum: "Init" "Pending" "Verified" "Rejected" "MarkedForDelete" "Deleted"

Image status

statusDescription
string

Status description

Responses

/manager/api/v2/instanceImage/{instanceImageId}/instanceImageStatus:update

application/json

  • "statusDescription": "string"
}

  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "fields": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

getInstanceImage

Get instance image details

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
instanceImageId
required
string

An instance image

Responses

/manager/api/v2/instanceImage/{instanceImageId}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "instanceImageInfo": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "name": "string",
    • "tag": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "origin": {
      • "repository": "string",
      • "tag": "string",
      • "isPrivate": true,
      • "taskId": "string"
      },
    • "baseImageId": "string",
    • "digest": "string",
    • "type": {
      • "kind": "Spark",
      • "version": "string"
      },
    • "status": "Init",
    • "statusDescription": "string",
    • "createdBy": "string",
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    },
  • "layers": [
    • {
      • "mime": "string",
      • "digest": "string",
      • "size": 0,
      • "annotations": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "history": [
    • {
      • "created": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "command": "string",
      • "comment": "string",
      • "emptyLayer": true
      }
    ]
}

Storage Service

File upload and storage management

listStorage

List all of your storage uploads

Authorizations:
accessToken
query Parameters
pageToken
string

Pagination token

pageSize
integer <int32>

Page size or 0 for default (current maximum is 100)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/storage

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "nextPageToken": "string",
  • "result": [
    • {
      • "storageId": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "createdBy": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "state": "New",
      • "sealed": true,
      • "markedForDeletion": true
      }
    ]
}

createStorage

Create a new storage upload. If an upload with the given name already exists and is still available for uploads, the existing upload will be returned.

Authorizations:
accessToken
Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string

Name for the storage. Must be unique in the system.

description
string

Optional description for the upload.

Responses

/manager/api/v2/storage

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "storageId": "string",
  • "name": "string"
}

deactivateStorage

Mark the storage upload for deactivation. Once any workloads using it have completed it will be set to inactive.

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
storageId
required
string
  • A storage upload. Storage uploads can be a single file or a collection of files.
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/storage/{storageId}:deactivate

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "fields": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

listStorageStorageItem

Get the item details of a storage upload

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
storageId
required
string
  • A storage upload. Storage uploads can be a single file or a collection of files.
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)
query Parameters
pageToken
string

Pagination token

pageSize
integer <int32>

Page size or 0 for default (current maximum is 100)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/storage/{storageId}/storageItem

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "nextPageToken": "string",
  • "result": [
    • {
      • "key": "string",
      • "size": 0,
      • "eTag": "string",
      • "lastModified": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

updateStorageStorageItem

Finalize the storage upload for the given item

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
storageId
required
string
  • A storage upload. Storage uploads can be a single file or a collection of files.
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)
Request Body schema: application/json
required
key
required
string

The path of the item.

Responses

/manager/api/v2/storage/{storageId}/storageItem

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "key": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "fields": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

renameStorageStorageItem

Rename an item in a storage upload

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
storageId
required
string
  • A storage upload. Storage uploads can be a single file or a collection of files.
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)
Request Body schema: application/json
required
key
required
string

The path of the item.

newKey
required
string

The new path of the item.

Responses

/manager/api/v2/storage/{storageId}/storageItem:rename

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "key": "string",
  • "newKey": "string"
}

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "fields": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

getStorage

Get the details of a storage upload

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
storageId
required
string
  • A storage upload. Storage uploads can be a single file or a collection of files.
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/storage/{storageId}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "storageId": "string",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "createdBy": "string",
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "state": "New",
  • "sealed": true,
  • "markedForDeletion": true
}

updateStorage

Finalize a storage upload. It will be available for usage and cannot be added to.

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
storageId
required
string
  • A storage upload. Storage uploads can be a single file or a collection of files.
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/storage/{storageId}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "fields": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

deleteStorage

Mark the storage upload for deletion. It and its contents will be deleted shortly after all uses of it have completed.

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
storageId
required
string
  • A storage upload. Storage uploads can be a single file or a collection of files.
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/storage/{storageId}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "fields": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

patchUpdateStorage

Change the name or description of a storage upload

Only include fields you wish to update. Missing or unrecognized fields are ignored.

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
storageId
required
string
  • A storage upload. Storage uploads can be a single file or a collection of files.
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)
Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
string

Name for the storage. Must be unique in the system.

description
string

Optional description for the upload.

Responses

/manager/api/v2/storage/{storageId}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string"
}

  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "fields": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

createStorageStorageItemUri

Generate a pre-signed URI to upload an item to the storage upload

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
storageId
required
string
  • A storage upload. Storage uploads can be a single file or a collection of files.
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)
query Parameters
forReading
boolean

If true, returns a URI for reading an item instead of for writing an item

Request Body schema: application/json
required
key
required
string

The path of the item.

Responses

/manager/api/v2/storage/{storageId}/storageItemUri

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "key": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "uri": "string"
}

pingStorage

While uploading files to a newly created storage instance, you must periodically call this method to inform the system that the upload is still in progress. Failing to do so may result in the upload being marked as failed and deleted.

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
storageId
required
string
  • A storage upload. Storage uploads can be a single file or a collection of files.
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/storage/{storageId}:ping

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "storageId": "string"
}

sealStorage

Mark this storage as permanently sealed. No further items can be added to it or removed from it once it is finalized.

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
storageId
required
string
  • A storage upload. Storage uploads can be a single file or a collection of files.
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/storage/{storageId}:seal

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "fields": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

listStorageInstance

List all instances using the given storage upload

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
storageId
required
string
  • A storage upload. Storage uploads can be a single file or a collection of files.
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type

  • {
    • "instanceId": "string"
    }
]

activateStorage

Mark the storage upload for activation. Once activation has completed it can be used by your workloads.

Authorizations:
accessToken
path Parameters
storageId
required
string
  • A storage upload. Storage uploads can be a single file or a collection of files.
  • This parameter can be looked up using name instead of its Id. Use name=value instead of an Id to lookup/search using the value. value must be encoded (see RFC including =)

Responses

/manager/api/v2/storage/{storageId}:activate

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "fields": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

path Parameters
storageId

string

Model Definitions

InstanceImageImport

instanceImageImportId
required
string

The image import Id

{
  • "instanceImageImportId": "string"
}

Common

applicationName
string

The application name. If not provided a name will be generated.

object

Any Spark configuration/properties to set arguments

jars
Array of strings

Any jars to pass in the --jars Spark argument

pythonFiles
Array of strings

Any python files to pass in the --py-files Spark argument

files
Array of strings

Any files to pass in the --files Spark argument

archives
Array of strings

Any archives to pass in the --archives Spark argument

object

Any environment variables to set

resourcePool
string

Optional - the resource pool to use (you must have permission to use it)

instanceImageId
string

Instance image id to use (you must have permission to use it)

secretUploadIds
Array of strings

Optional - secret uploads

Secrets will be set as environment variables in the Spark driver and executors.

secretUploads
Array of strings

DEPRECATED - use secretUploadIds

Array of objects (UploadMapping)

Optional - file uploads (read only)

Array of objects (InlineUploadMapping)

Optional - inline file uploads. See Uploads for more details and limits. (read only)

options
Array of strings
Items Value: "EncryptCommunication"

Details:

  • "EncryptCommunication": Enable encryption for communication between the driver and executors
Array of objects (VolumeMount)

Volumes to mount to the job (read only)

{
  • "applicationName": "string",
  • "sparkProperties": {
    • "property1": "string",
    • "property2": "string"
    },
  • "jars": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "pythonFiles": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "files": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "archives": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "environmentVariables": {
    • "property1": "string",
    • "property2": "string"
    },
  • "resourcePool": "string",
  • "instanceImageId": "string",
  • "secretUploadIds": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "secretUploads": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "fileUploads": [
    • {
      • "uploadId": "string",
      • "mountPath": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "inlineFileUploads": [
    • {
      • "comment": "string",
      • "fileName": "string",
      • "uploadType": "Text",
      • "data": "string",
      • "mountPath": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "options": [
    • "EncryptCommunication"
    ],
  • "volumeMounts": [
    • {
      • "storageId": "string",
      • "storageName": "string",
      • "mountPath": "string",
      • "bindToInstance": true
      }
    ]
}

string

size

Manage instance logs cleaner

null

GlobalStorageUsage

totalUsedBytes
required
integer <int64>

Total storage used (bytes)

totalObjectsCount
required
integer <int64>

Total number of objects stored

logsUsedBytes
required
integer <int64>

Storage used by logs (bytes)

logObjectsCount
required
integer <int64>

Number of log objects

historyServerEventsUsedBytes
required
integer <int64>

Storage used by history server events (bytes)

historyServerEventsObjectsCount
required
integer <int64>

Number of objects stored by history server events

notebookWorkspacesUsedBytes
required
integer <int64>

Storage used by notebook workspaces (bytes)

notebookWorkspacesObjectsCount
required
integer <int64>

Number of objects stored in notebook workspaces

required
Array of objects (InstanceStorageUsage)

Storage usage details per instance

required
Array of objects (ResourcePoolStorageUsage)

Storage usage details per resource pool

lastRefreshedAt
required
string <date-time>

Last refreshed at

  • "totalUsedBytes": 0,

storageId

ResourcePoolPatch

resourcePoolId
string

The name of this resource pool (must be unique)

priority
integer <int32>

The priority of this pool. Pools with larger/higher priority numbers have priority over pools with smaller/lower priority numbers. If not specified, the priority is "0".

minMemory
string

Minimum memory (as a Spark quantity string)

minCores
string

Minimum virtual cores (as a CPU unit)

maxMemory
string

Maximum memory (as a Spark quantity string)

maxCores
string

Maximum virtual cores (as a CPU unit)

maxGpus
string

Maximum gpus (as a Spark quantity string)

applicationMaxGpus
string

Maximum gpus per application (as a Spark quantity string)

{
  • "resourcePoolId": "string",
  • "priority": 0,
  • "minMemory": "string",
  • "minCores": "string",
  • "maxMemory": "string",
  • "maxCores": "string",
  • "maxGpus": "string",
  • "applicationMaxGpus": "string"
}

VolumeMount

storageId
string

ID of the storage to mount. Use either storageId or storageName but not both.

storageName
string

Name of the storage to mount. Use either storageId or storageName but not both.

mountPath
string

Optional mount path. If not specified, the volume is mounted to the working directory using the storage name.

bindToInstance
required
boolean

Can only be used with new storage uploads. Ties the storage upload to the workload being created so that when the workload is deleted, the storage upload is also deleted. The storage upload cannot be used with any other workload.

{
  • "storageId": "string",
  • "storageName": "string",
  • "mountPath": "string",
  • "bindToInstance": true
}

SecretUpload

comment
required
string

Comment or description. Used only for your own reference purposes.

required
object

Map of name-to-binary secrets. Data must be Base64 encoded.

When the uploaded secret is used in an instance this map of secrets/values are set as environment variables. Thus, the secret name must be valid environment variable identifier.

See Uploads for more details and limits.

{
  • "comment": "string",
  • "secrets": {
    • "property1": "string",
    • "property2": "string"
    }
}

notebookName
string

The notebook name. If not provided a name will be generated.

resourcePool
string

Optional - the resource pool to use (you must have permission to use it)

instanceImageId
string

Instance image id to use (you must have permission to use it)

description
string

Optional - the description of the notebook instance

Array of objects (VolumeMount)

Volumes to mount to the server (read only)

      • "mountPath": "string",
      • "bindToInstance": true
      }

}

activatedAt
required
string

The system maintenance enabled at

activatedBy
required
string

activatedVersion
required
string

The version of the system for which the maintenance mode has been activated

deactivatedAt

deactivatedVersion

{

}

SparkBatchJob

applicationResource
required
string

The application resource to run - must be on an accessible object store

mainClass
string

The main class of the batch job

cronTimeZone
string

Optional CRON timezone. If provided, specify a time zone for the CRON job. Default is UTC.

See List of Time Zones.

cronSchedule
string

Optional CRON schedule. If provided, runs the job on the given schedule.

See Wikipedia's CRON article for details on CRON schedules.

ttlSecondsAfterFinished
integer <int32>

Optional.

ttlSecondsAfterFinished specifies the number of seconds after completion that the driver is eligible to be deleted/cleaned. Default is 1 seconds.

applicationArguments
Array of strings

Any application arguments

required
object (Common)
{
  • "applicationResource": "string",
  • "mainClass": "string",
  • "cronTimeZone": "string",
  • "cronSchedule": "string",

name
required
string

The instance name

type
required
string

The instance type

createdBy
required
string

User that created the instance

ownerRole
string

required
object

Any additional details about the instance

sparkEventLogsCleanerEnabled
boolean

Enable Spark event logs cleaner

sparkEventLogsCleanerInterval
string

string

sparkEventLogsCompactionEnabled
boolean

Enable Spark event logs compaction

sparkEventLogsCompactionMaxFilesToRetain
string

boolean

instanceLogsCleanerInterval
string

string

UploadMapping

uploadId
required
string

The upload ID

mountPath
required
string

The path to mount the files at. This must be a partial path as an uploads directory will be prefixed to it. E.g. if mountPath is /my/mount/path then the actual directory will be /opt/spark/uploads/my/mount/path

{
  • "uploadId": "string",
  • "mountPath": "string"
}

accessKey
required
string

The proxy AccessKey provided by your administrator

secretKey
required
string

The proxy SecretKey provided by your administrator

region
required
string

The S3 region of the bucket

bucket
required
string

The bucket for creating the pre-signed URLs

key
required
string

The key for creating the pre-signed URLs

{
  • "accessKey": "string",
  • "secretKey": "string",
  • "region": "string",
  • "bucket": "string",
  • "key": "string"
}

InlineUploadMapping

comment
required
string

Comment or description. Used only for your own reference purposes.

fileName
required
string

The name/file name of the upload

uploadType
required
string
Enum: "Text" "Binary"

Whether this is a text or binary upload

data
required
string

The upload data. For binary, it must be Base64 encoded.

mountPath
required
string

The path to mount the files at. This must be a partial path as an uploads directory will be prefixed to it. E.g. if mountPath is /my/mount/path then the actual directory will be /opt/spark/uploads/my/mount/path

{
  • "comment": "string",
  • "fileName": "string",
  • "uploadType": "Text",
  • "data": "string",
  • "mountPath": "string"
}

newName
string

The application name. If not provided a name will be generated.

resourcePool
string

Optional - the resource pool to use (you must have permission to use it)

  • "newName": "string",

NewStorage

name
required
string

Name for the storage. Must be unique in the system.

description
string

Optional description for the upload.

{
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string"
}

ResourcePool

resourcePoolId
required
string

The name of this resource pool (must be unique)

priority
integer <int32>

The priority of this pool. Pools with larger/higher priority numbers have priority over pools with smaller/lower priority numbers. If not specified, the priority is "0".

minMemory
required
string

Minimum memory (as a Spark quantity string)

minCores
required
string

Minimum virtual cores (as a CPU unit)

maxMemory
required
string

Maximum memory (as a Spark quantity string)

maxCores
required
string

Maximum virtual cores (as a CPU unit)

maxGpus
string

Maximum gpus (as a Spark quantity string)

applicationMaxGpus
string

Maximum gpus per application (as a Spark quantity string)

{
  • "resourcePoolId": "string",
  • "priority": 0,
  • "minMemory": "string",
  • "minCores": "string",
  • "maxMemory": "string",
  • "maxCores": "string",
  • "maxGpus": "string",
  • "applicationMaxGpus": "string"
}

StorageBase

storageId
required
string

Storage ID

name
required
string

The name of the storage

description
string

The description of the storage

createdBy
required
string

Who created the storage

createdAt
required
string <date-time>

When the storage was created

state
required
string
Enum: "New" "Inactive" "Activating" "Active"

The current state of the storage

sealed
required
boolean

When true, no further items can be added or removed

markedForDeletion
required
boolean

When true, the storage will be deleted when it is no longer in use

{
  • "storageId": "string",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "createdBy": "string",
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "state": "New",
  • "sealed": true,
  • "markedForDeletion": true
}
